message:
feat(gateway): implement Metrics and Alerts System

- Add MetricsService with counters, gauges, histograms, snapshots
- Add AlertService with rules, evaluation, cooldown, acknowledgment
- Add REST endpoints: /metrics, /metrics/prometheus, /alerts
- Add WebSocket support for agent state change events
- Add 55 unit tests for metrics, alerts, and WebSocket

Closes flywheel_gateway-f9d

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
